item.name: Armor Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of what appears to be cermet. Placing it near your suit of magitek armor will magically bring the machine to life.

mount.name: Magitek Armor
mount.action: Call into battle your suit of Garlond Ironworks-modified magitek armor.
mount.description: This suit of Garlean-developed reaper-class magitek battle armor has had its original control systems purged and replaced with a new, modified core built by Cid of the Garlond Ironworks.
mount.tooltip:
At last, our very own
suit of magitek armor!
- Cid Garlond
